headline: JPMorgan Raises its Price Target on UnitedHealth Group (UNH)
summary: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) is one of the 7 Best Longevity Stocks to Buy Now. On June 8, 2026, JPMorgan raised the firm’s price target on UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) to $466 from $420 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares.
